entities.name: AFLATOXIN
entities.description: A toxic substance produced by fungi that contaminates crops and causes severe health issues in humans

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The agricultural crop targeted for the mitigation of aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: GENETIC RESISTANCE
entities.description: The inherent ability of a crop variety to resist infection or contamination by aflatoxin

entities.name: POST-HARVEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Practices applied after harvest to prevent aflatoxin contamination in crops

entities.name: FUNGUS
entities.description: The biological agent responsible for the production of aflatoxin

entities.name: CLIMATIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental factors that influence fungal behavior and challenge genetic improvement efforts

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of observing and measuring the physical traits of an organism

entities.name: GENETIC PREDICTION
entities.description: The use of genetic data to predict the traits or performance of a crop

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of altering the genetic makeup of a crop to improve desired traits

entities.name: IN VITRO SEED COLONIZATION
entities.description: A specific measure of how fungi colonize seeds in a controlled environment

entities.name: PRE-HARVEST AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The level of aflatoxin contamination occurring before the crop is harvested

entities.name: AFLATOXIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: The capacity of the fungus to produce aflatoxin within the crop

entities.name: OMICS APPROACHES
entities.description: High-throughput biological analysis techniques used to provide genetic solutions

entities.name: NEXT-GENERATION GENOMICS TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Advanced sequencing and genomic tools used within omics approaches
